summary: 6 changes planned in dependency order. p10-c003 first (wasmtime 26→46 + object_store 0.11→0.14 upgrades clear all CVSS≥7.0 advisories and unblock the cargo audit CI gate). Then TLS (c001), secrets (c002), alerting (c004), k6 regression (c005), release (c006). All P0 changes are Rust-code or compose; no new architectural concepts. OpenSpec proposals and tasks written for all 6.
